description_long: This helmet features a sleek, aerodynamic shell with a predominantly red exterior, accented by subtle weathering and scuff marks that suggest regular urban use. The front is equipped with a dark, tinted visor that covers the eye area, providing both protection and a futuristic appearance. Angular lines and sculpted contours run along the sides, enhancing its modern, aggressive look. The lower front section includes a chin guard, while the sides and rear are smoothly rounded for comfort and safety. There are no visible brand logos or graphic designs, giving the helmet a minimalist, utilitarian aesthetic. The surface appears hard and slightly matte, with no visible ventilation openings or retention system details.
description: A red, modern helmet with a dark visor, angular contours, and a minimalist, weathered finish. It has a hard, matte surface and no visible logos or graphics.
description_view_0: Top-down view showing the smooth, rounded red shell with subtle weathering and the pointed front contour.
description_view_1: Left-side view highlighting the angular visor, chin guard, and sculpted side lines.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the rounded back and the absence of any visible openings or logos.
description_view_3: Right-side view similar to the left, showing the visor, chin guard, and side contours.
